items.title: Ed Miliband and his entourage spent more than £800,000 on trip to COP30 environment summit in Brazil - including flights, private apartments and hotel rooms

items.title: Iran’s public hanging of teen dissidents highlights its regime’s savagery yet again
items.deck: Like a trapped animal, Iran is lashing out, executing teenagers in public for “waging war against God” to terrify its restive people, and bombing its neighbors to convince them to push the United States and Israel to end the war.

items.title: Still trailing by 23 votes, NC Senate leader asks for hand recount
items.deck: The leader of North Carolina’s upper Legislature is requesting another recount after a machine tally showed him losing a contested Republican primary for his state Senate seat by 23 votes.
